name: com.rlmg.toolscontentloading
description: A set of Monobehaviours and static Utility classes for Rollmuggers to use when loading content in Unity.

samples.description: Shared assets necessary for most examples.
Demonstrates use of ContentLoader for a config.json file.
Demonstrates use of ContentLoader and MediaLoadingUtils for loading content and images.
Demonstrates use of GraphQLLoader with downloading remote images.
Shows how loading from different sources might be ordered.
Demonstrates use of Tasks for loading the content text, for when loading from disk can't block execution on the main thread.

samples.displayName: Remote Media Example with Caching and Async
samples.description: Demonstrates caching via ContentCacherAsync and compares use of MediaLoadingUtility methods for concurrent loading via Tasks to sequential loading.
